what_you_sell_and_to_whom: an 11 fl oz canned ready-to-drink lactose-free protein shake delivering 32g complete protein with zero added sugar — for active adults who want clean, portable protein without the chalkiness or artificial sweeteners of mainstream RTDs
product_type: 11 fl oz canned RTD protein shake (sold in 12-packs)
tone: premium clean-fuel positioning; convenience-forward but uncompromising on ingredient standards; for the standards-driven athlete who reads labels
proof_points: Co-formulated by Senada Greca (Co-Founder & Scientific Advisor)
Medical/scientific advisors: Dr. William Li, M.D. and Dr. David Jan, Ph.D.
Press: Forbes, People Magazine, Yahoo Life, AthleTech News
32g protein with complete amino acid profile
5g fiber to support satiety & digestive wellness
5 calories per gram of protein (160 calories total)
92% of calories from protein and fiber
Lactose-free milk protein isolate, real cocoa/vanilla — no artificial sweeteners, 0g added sugar
